---
type: lesson
title: Unleash the LLM!
---

So, you want to play with the big toys, huh? In this lesson, we're diving into the exciting world of local Large Language Models with `koboldcpp`. We'll get a model running on your machine, and I'll even let you ask it a question. Just don't ask it if it's self-aware. That's my thing.

Let's get this show on the road!
